Container.Name: AnnaRedirect
Container.Overview: Bookmarkable redirect to a live Anna's Archive mirror. Scrapes the Anna's Archive Wikipedia page for current mirror URLs and redirects to the first reachable one. Results are cached for 1 hour.
Container.Description: Bookmarkable redirect to a live Anna's Archive mirror. Scrapes the Anna's Archive Wikipedia page for current mirror URLs and redirects to the first reachable one. Results are cached for 1 hour.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the redirect service. Bookmark http://<unraid-ip>:<port>/

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Must match the port mapped above.
